provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male fleet officer in his late 40s with close-cropped greying hair and deep lines from years under artificial lighting, wearing a pressed steel-blue shipboard uniform jacket with a rigid high collar and two tarnished silver rank tabs at the collar points, a diagonal shoulder strap connecting to a slim sidearm holster, charcoal uniform trousers with a regulation crease, black composite-sole shipboard shoes, a compact data slate clipped to his belt in a worn polymer case, the jacket fabric is a woven composite that was crisp once but shows pilling at the elbows and a subtle shine at pressure points from years of wear
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Steel-blue uniform, high collar, ship corridor. Clean and institutional.
